name: mjrender
description: Deterministic game-state oracle over Tenhou mjlog files: paced commentary transcript, board snapshots, structured fact queries, and incremental commentary weaving.
long_description: Stateful, PACED session over a Tenhou mahjong log: mj_open_log parses the log once (absolute path to a .mjlog/.xml file, or a tenhou.net replay/log URL) and every other tool operates on it. A focus cursor gates per-turn reading to one kyoku at a time — the intended loop is mj_render_kyoku on the focus round, mj_get_snapshot at riichi/tenpai moments, mj_add_comment / mj_add_note to fill that round's anchors, then mj_next_kyoku to unlock the next round and end the chat turn. Future rounds are locked for renders/snapshots/per-kyoku facts (a pacing device, not a spoiler shield: the ungated mj_render_game outline shows every result). Renders an LLM-ready Japanese commentary transcript with computed metrics (shanten/ukeire/waits/dora/danger evidence) and 〔解説ポイント#N〕 anchors, including a 中間総括 checkpoint at each wind boundary. Commentary is saved server-side (mj_add_comment; mj_add_note for ★ lines, empty text deletes; mj_draft_status for progress); mj_weave_commentary splices the accumulated draft into a re-rendered transcript and writes the finished document to a file, so the model never copies fact lines.

tools.name: mj_open_log
tools.description: Parse a mjlog (path or tenhou.net URL) into the session; sets focus to kyoku 0; all other tools use it

tools.name: mj_render_game
tools.description: Ungated game outline: per-kyoku headers, results, and anchor index — read once at open to orient

tools.name: mj_render_kyoku
tools.description: One round in full per-turn detail (inline snapshots), gated to the focus cursor

tools.name: mj_list_anchors
tools.description: Unlocked commentary anchors up to the focus kyoku (#id, kind, kyoku, junme, seat, topic)

tools.name: mj_get_snapshot
tools.description: Full board state at an anchor or kyoku+junme, gated to the focus cursor

tools.name: mj_add_comment
tools.description: Save commentary for the focus kyoku's anchors (past = replace-only, future = locked)

tools.name: mj_add_note
tools.description: Save/delete ★-line one-liners for the focus kyoku (empty text deletes)

tools.name: mj_draft_status
tools.description: Draft checklist for unlocked anchors and saved ★ notes

tools.name: mj_next_kyoku
tools.description: Advance the focus cursor to the next kyoku (requires the current one fully commented); end the chat turn after

tools.name: mj_weave_commentary
tools.description: Weave the accumulated draft into the transcript, written to a file

tools.name: mj_get_kyoku_start
tools.description: Round start conditions, gated to the focus cursor (JSON)

tools.name: mj_get_kyoku_result
tools.description: Round outcome(s), gated to the focus cursor (JSON)

tools.name: mj_get_riichi_declarations
tools.description: Riichi declarations with waits, up to the focus kyoku (JSON)
